what_it_does: This file is a ledger record for an image asset: it registers a JPEG named pitch-deck/p-05 as a design-source ground-truth item, linking it to a blob URI and recording provenance metadata.
observations: YAML frontmatter declares an image ledger entry with id pitch-deck/p-05
body text reads 'SOURCE design ground-truth — pitch-deck/p-05.jpg'
standouts: w and h are 0 despite being an image record
the blob URI is the only content pointer
conventions: Body provides a short human-readable caption
concerns: w and h are 0, suggesting dimensions were not extracted or are missing
links array is empty, so no explicit relationships are recorded
No alt text or content description is present
notes: A sparse ledger stub for a pitch-deck image asset that records provenance and a blob pointer but lacks extracted dimensions and relationships.
questions: What visual content appears on pitch-deck page 5?
How does this asset relate to other pitch-deck pages or the deck as a whole?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose is to record a source design ground-truth image; the file does exactly that, though its metadata is incomplete.
intention_signals: It tries to establish a canonical, traceable record for a pitch-deck image so downstream consumers can locate the original source blob.
contribution: It contributes a ground-truth ledger entry that maps a pitch-deck image name to a content blob and provenance metadata, which a fused system could use to resolve or cite the original asset.
summary_for_embedding: A ledger metadata file registering the JPEG image pitch-deck/p-05 as a design-source ground-truth asset with a blob pointer, zero dimensions, and empty links.
intention_for_embedding: This file exists to catalog and preserve the original source image for pitch-deck page 5 in a traceable asset ledger.
